message: The atelier will be exceptionally closed from November 7th to 8th
title: Atelier closing
subtitle: Thank you for your patience and trust
contentDescription:
The atelier will be exceptionally closed from November 7th to 8th.

Activity will resume normally from **Monday November 9th**. Thank you for your understanding and patience.

In the meantime, happy flying to all!
imageAlt: Photo of a paraglider in the blue sky
